en: I pour the egg into the pan.
ipa: aɪ pɔː ði eɪɡ ˈɪn.tuː the pan

ipa: i fry one side of the egg

en: I should be careful not to burn it.
vi: Tôi phải cẩn thận không để trứng bị cháy.
ipa: i should be careful not to burn it

en: I turn the egg over.

en: I fry the other side.
ipa: i fry the other side

en: Now it’s almost done.

en: I put on an apron.

ipa: aɪ həʊld ði ˈeɪ.pɹən stɹɪŋz

en: I do it behind my back.
